# cloudflare_moq_relay (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (String) Cloudflare account identifier.

### Optional

- `filter` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--filter))
- `relay_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `config` (Attributes) upstreams and lingering_subscribe are mutually exclusive. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config))
- `created` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `modified` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `status` (String) "connected" when active, omitted otherwise.
Available values: "connected".
- `uid` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter`

Optional:

- `asc` (Boolean) Sort order by `created`. When true, results are returned oldest-first
(ascending); otherwise newest-first (descending, the default).
- `created_after` (String) Cursor for pagination. Returns relays created strictly after this
RFC 3339 timestamp (typically the `created` value of the last item
on the current page, to fetch the next page).
- `created_before` (String) Cursor for pagination. Returns relays created strictly before this
RFC 3339 timestamp (typically the `created` value of the first item
on the current page, to fetch the previous page).
- `per_page` (Number) Maximum number of relays to return per page.


<a id="nestedatt--config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config`

Read-Only:

- `lingering_subscribe` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config--lingering_subscribe))
- `upstreams` (Attributes) Upstreams are external MOQT server publishers that a relay falls back
to when it has no local publisher for a requested namespace/track. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config--upstreams))

<a id="nestedatt--config--lingering_subscribe"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.lingering_subscribe`

Read-Only:

- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `max_timeout_ms` (Number) Relay-level ceiling on lingering subscribe timeout (ms). Default 30000.


<a id="nestedatt--config--upstreams"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.upstreams`

Read-Only:

- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `upstreams` (Attributes List) Ordered list of upstream MOQT server publishers. Each entry is an
object (not a bare string) so per-upstream configuration can be
added in the future without another breaking change. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config--upstreams--upstreams))

<a id="nestedatt--config--upstreams--upstreams"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config.upstreams.upstreams`

Read-Only:

- `url` (String) Upstream MOQT server publisher URL.
